api_key.description: Dolibarr API key, sent as the DOLAPIKEY header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Dolibarr REST API base URL, e.g. https://your-dolibarr-host/api/index.php.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

thirdparty_id.description: Third party (rowid) the 'thirdparty_detail' stream reads a single record for. Required only when reading the 'thirdparty_detail' stream.

contact_id.description: Contact (rowid) the 'contact_detail' stream reads a single record for. Required only when reading the 'contact_detail' stream.

product_id.description: Product (rowid) the 'product_detail' stream reads a single record for. Required only when reading the 'product_detail' stream.

invoice_id.description: Invoice (rowid) the 'invoice_detail' stream reads a single record for. Required only when reading the 'invoice_detail' stream.

order_id.description: Order (rowid) the 'order_detail' stream reads a single record for. Required only when reading the 'order_detail' stream.
